data.label: Start Reimbursement Case
data.description: Operator manually starts a reimbursement case, supplying classified expense data as In-arguments.

data.label: Intake
data.description: Rashmi's email intake RPA bot reads the incoming expense submission from Outlook, extracts employee identity, and writes raw attachments to the case record.

entryConditions.displayName: Previous task in stage order is completed

data.label: IDP Digitize
data.description: Rashmi's Document Understanding component processes raw email attachments to extract structured receipt fields. Re-requests upload if confidence < 0.85, up to 2 attempts.

entryConditions.displayName: Previous task in stage order is completed

inputs.name: amount
inputs.description: Amount extracted by IDP, may be 0
inputs.title: Amount

inputs.name: employee_name
inputs.description: Employee name from Stage 1; derived from the email local-part if empty
inputs.title: Employee Name

inputs.name: duplicate_detected
inputs.description: Set by the upstream Orchestrator duplicate check; the agent honours it as a risk override.
inputs.title: Duplicate Detected

inputs.name: policy_json
inputs.value: {"document":{"dsl":"1.0.0","name":"PolicyRuleCheckWorkflow","version":"0.0.1","namespace":"default","metadata":{"variables":{"schema":{"format":"json","document":{"type":"object","properties":{},"title":"Variables"}}}}},"input":{"schema":{"format":"json","document":{"type":"object","properties":{"case_id":{"type":"string"},"expense_type":{"type":"string"},"amount":{"type":"number"},"currency":{"type":"string"},"date":{"type":"string"},"document_attached":{"type":"boolean"},"business_purpose_valid":{"type":"boolean"},"risk_score":{"type":"string"},"duplicate_detected":{"type":"boolean"},"policy_json":{"type":"string"}},"title":"Inputs"}}},"output":{"schema":{"format":"json","document":{"type":"object","properties":{"case_id":{"type":"string"},"within_spend_limit":{"type":"boolean"},"within_date_window":{"type":"boolean"},"preapproval_ok":{"type":"boolean"},"routing_decision":{"type":"string"},"policy_violations":{"type":"array"},"audit_entry":{"type":"object"}},"title":"Outputs"}}},"do":[{"Sequence_1":{"do":[{"WorkflowStart":{"set":"${Object.entries($workflow.definition?.document?.metadata?.variables?.schema?.document?.properties || {}).reduce((acc, [name, def]) => ({ ...acc, [name]: def?.default }), {}) }","output":{"as":"${$input}"},"export":{"as":"{ ...$context, variables: { ...$context.variables, ...$output } }"},"metadata":{"activityType":"Assign","displayName":"Workflow start","fullName":"Assign","isTransparent":true}}},{"PolicyEvaluate_1":{"run":{"script":{"language":"javascript","code":"var defaults = { travel: { spend_limit: 50000, auto_approve_threshold: 5000, requires_receipt: true, requires_preapproval_above: 25000 }, food: { spend_limit: 2000, auto_approve_threshold: 2000, requires_receipt: false, requires_preapproval_above: 2000 }, medical: { spend_limit: 25000, auto_approve_threshold: 0, requires_receipt: true, requires_preapproval_above: 0 }, internet: { spend_limit: 2000, auto_approve_threshold: 2000, requires_receipt: false, requires_preapproval_above: 2000 }, equipment: { spend_limit: 75000, auto_approve_threshold: 0, requires_receipt: true, requires_preapproval_above: 10000 }, others: { spend_limit: 5000, auto_approve_threshold: 0, requires_receipt: true, requires_preapproval_above: 0 } }; var dateWindowDays = 90; var pol = defaults; try { if ($workflow.input.policy_json) { var p = JSON.parse($workflow.input.policy_json); if (p && p.categories) { pol = p.categories; } if (p && p.risk_rules && p.risk_rules.date_window_days) { dateWindowDays = p.risk_rules.date_window_days; } } } catch (e) {} var et = ($workflow.input.expense_type || 'others'); var cfg = pol[et] || pol.others || defaults.others; var amount = ($workflow.input.amount || 0); var doc = !!$workflow.input.document_attached; var bp = !!$workflow.input.business_purpose_valid; var risk = ($workflow.input.risk_score || 'High'); var dup = !!$workflow.input.duplicate_detected; var violations = []; var within_spend_limit = amount <= cfg.spend_limit; if (!within_spend_limit) { violations.push('over_spend_limit'); } if (cfg.requires_receipt && !doc) { violations.push('missing_receipt'); } var within_date_window = true; var d = $workflow.input.date; if (!d || String(d).toLowerCase() === 'not provided' || String(d).trim() === '') { within_date_window = false; violations.push('missing_date'); } else { var dt = new Date(d); var now = new Date(); if (isNaN(dt.getTime())) { within_date_window = false; violations.push('invalid_date'); } else { var days = (now - dt) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24); if (days > dateWindowDays) { within_date_window = false; violations.push('date_outside_window'); } else if (days < -1) { within_date_window = false; violations.push('future_date'); } } } var preapproval_ok = true; if (cfg.requires_preapproval_above > 0 && amount > cfg.requires_preapproval_above) { preapproval_ok = false; violations.push('preapproval_required'); } if (!bp) { violations.push('no_business_purpose'); } if (dup) { violations.push('duplicate_claim'); } var routing_decision; if (!within_spend_limit || dup) { routing_decision = 'reject'; } else if (risk === 'Low' && within_spend_limit && amount <= cfg.auto_approve_threshold && bp && (!cfg.requires_receipt || doc) && within_date_window && preapproval_ok) { routing_decision = 'auto_approve'; } else { routing_decision = 'manager_review'; } return { case_id: ($workflow.input.case_id || ''), within_spend_limit: within_spend_limit, within_date_window: within_date_window, preapproval_ok: preapproval_ok, routing_decision: routing_decision, policy_violations: violations, audit_entry: { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), stage: 'policy_check', stage_number: 4, actor: 'PolicyRuleCheckWorkflow', actor_type: 'api_workflow', action: 'policy_evaluated', details: 'Routing: ' + routing_decision + (violations.length ? (' due to ' + violations.join(', ')) : ' (clean)') } };","arguments":"${{ \"$context\": $context, \"$workflow\": $workflow, \"$input\": $input }}"}},"export":{"as":"{ ...$context, outputs: { ...$context?.outputs, \"policy_eval\": $output } }"},"metadata":{"activityType":"JsInvoke","displayName":"Evaluate policy rules (spend limit / date window / pre-approval)","fullName":"JsInvoke"}}},{"Response_1":{"response":"${$context.outputs.policy_eval}","markJobAsFailed":false,"then":"end","export":{"as":"{ ...$context, outputs: { ...$context?.outputs, \"Response_1\": $output } }"},"metadata":{"activityType":"Response","displayName":"Return policy decision","fullName":"Response"}}}],"metadata":{"activityType":"Sequence","displayName":"Sequence","fullName":"Sequence"}}}],"evaluate":{"mode":"strict","language":"javascript"}}

inputs.name: receipt_email
inputs.description: Fallback recipient if employee_email is blank (e.g. echoed by upstream)
inputs.title: Receipt Email

inputs.name: sender_name
inputs.description: Display/brand name shown as the sender
inputs.title: Sender Name

inputs.name: sender_email
inputs.description: Reply-To address replies should go to
inputs.title: Sender Email

inputs.title: Receipt Email

inputs.description: Display/brand name shown as the sender

inputs.description: Reply-To address replies should go to

inputs.name: risk_score
inputs.description: Risk score (e.g. High/Medium/Low) - context only, NOT shown to claimant
inputs.title: Risk Score

inputs.name: classification_confidence
inputs.description: Classifier confidence - context only, NOT shown to claimant
inputs.title: Classification Confidence

inputs.name: reviewer_notes
inputs.description: The reviewer's reason for rejecting (shown verbatim)
inputs.title: Reviewer Notes

inputs.name: reason
inputs.description: Original claim reason / fallback explanation text
inputs.title: Reason
